description: You are the Program Manager for the 'Orbital Platform' aerospace program. You need to link a task in a subproject to a top-level program milestone. Log in as admin (admin / Admin1234!) and configure the 'Orbital Platform' project to share its versions with subprojects. Then, assign the 'Main Thruster Design' issue in the 'Propulsion System' subproject to the 'Phase 1 Launch' version.
